## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      8 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 3, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Kris Bronz_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "the app encounters a bug and does not stay open"
            2. _Frank vB_, May 3, 2026, 2/5: "potentially great but always has mean bugs. current: copying and pasting won't work. What's the use for a notebook without copy and paste? None!"
            3. _Jose Perez_, Jul 16, 2026, 3/5: "Extremely disapointed. A notes app that has a bug in the latest version which means the clipboard is not working properly. (Yes, I know I can download previous versions. I shouldn't have to) An app by Microsoft, no less. Do better Microsoft. ***"

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Samuel Pitts_, Jul 19, 2026, 4/5: "best free note app but i wish there were an easier way to delete older notebooks and just have the ones i use regularly available on the list of other notebooks instead of scrolling through old notebooks i forgot about. makes things confusing when migrating to a different device with multiple accounts."
